title: can`t read workbook.steam when Excel.stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter[BUG]
author: PizzaJu
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

after create workbook use `new ExceilJs.stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter({})`， use value `workbook.stream` is error in typescript

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```typescript
const wb = new ExcelJs.stream.xlsx.WorkbookWriter({});
typeof(wb.stream);
```

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

comments.author: rconjaerts
comments.body: We have the same issue. The `stream` property supposedly does not exist on `WorkbookWriter`. If this was actually the case, the code would crash, which isn't the case, so I suspect a type issue.

comments.author: robhoff-laerdal
comments.body:
I have the same issue. The docs indicate this property should be available so the `WorkbookWriter` type should provide a definition for this.

> This StreamBuf object, which can be accessed via the property workbook.stream, can be used to either access the bytes directly by stream.read() or to pipe the contents to another stream.
